idea: Weekly surge in Google Trends searches for bankruptcy lawyer signals bearish XLF

data.source: Google Trends weekly search interest for 'bankruptcy lawyer'

behavior: An uptick in bankruptcy lawyer searches indicates rising consumer financial distress, pressuring financial institutions.

market_impact.rationale: Higher consumer stress predicts increased loan defaults hitting financial sector earnings.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLF if weekly search interest rises 15% week-over-week
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 weeks or if searches decline 10% week-over-week

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Consumer financial distress topics cycle frequently with monthly and quarterly reporting.

idea: Daily spike in Google Trends searches for 'truck driver shortage' signals bullish XLI

data.source: Google Trends daily search interest for 'truck driver shortage'

behavior: Rising concern about truck driver shortages suggests pricing power and increased freight rates for logistics firms.

market_impact.rationale: Logistics sector benefits from supply constraints driving higher revenue per shipment.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLI when daily searches increase 20% vs 5-day moving average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 7 trading days or if searches revert below 5-day moving average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Labor shortage concerns ebb and flow frequently with news cycles and wage reports.

idea: Weekly surge in FRED series for Producer Price Index (PPI) signals bearish XLB

data.source: FRED Producer Price Index (PPI) weekly aggregated data

behavior: A sharp rise in PPI indicates input cost inflation pressure for materials companies, squeezing margins.

market_impact.rationale: Materials sector margins are sensitive to input cost inflation, reducing earnings expectations.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLB if weekly PPI rises more than 1.5% week-over-week
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or if PPI growth decelerates below 0.5% week-over-week

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Commodity price shocks and inflation pressures often spike multiple times per year.

idea: Daily spike in USGS earthquake activity near major logistics hubs signals bearish XLI

data.source: USGS earthquake daily activity near key logistics hubs

behavior: Increased seismic activity disrupts supply chains and port operations causing short-term freight delays.

market_impact.rationale: Logistics companies face operational risk and revenue disruption from natural disaster events.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLI if daily earthquake count near hubs exceeds 3 standard deviations above 30-day average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 10 trading days or when activity normalizes below 1 deviation

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Earthquake activity clusters and aftershocks create frequent volatility spikes in logistics.

idea: Weekly surge in Google Trends searches for 'energy bill crisis' signals bearish XLE

data.source: Google Trends weekly search interest for 'energy bill crisis'

behavior: Rising consumer concern over energy bills signals demand destruction risk and regulatory pressure on energy firms.

market_impact.rationale: Energy companies may face margin compression and demand slowdown from consumer stress.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLE if weekly searches rise 25% week-over-week
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 weeks or if weekly searches decline 15%

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Energy cost concerns intensify seasonally and during geopolitical events.

idea: Daily surge in Google Trends searches for 'home appliance repair' signals bullish XLY

data.source: Google Trends daily search interest for 'home appliance repair'

behavior: Spike in appliance repair searches shows consumers delaying replacement purchases, boosting discretionary repair services.

market_impact.rationale: Consumer discretionary firms in repair services and parts see volume increases.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLY if daily search volume is 30% above 7-day moving average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 5 trading days or when search volume drops below 7-day average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Consumer repair needs fluctuate frequently with appliance failures and weather events.

idea: Weekly surge in political insider selling filings signals bearish XLF

data.source: Political insider trading filings weekly aggregated

behavior: Increased insider selling among financial sector political figures suggests upcoming negative sentiment or regulation.

market_impact.rationale: Political insider selling often precedes sector underperformance due to regulatory risk.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLF if weekly insider selling volume spikes 40% above 12-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 6 weeks or when insider selling subsides below 15% above average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Political insider activity cycles with legislative and earnings calendar.

idea: Weekly rise in Google Trends search interest for 'warehouse fire' signals bearish XLI

data.source: Google Trends weekly search interest for 'warehouse fire'

behavior: Warehouse fires disrupt logistics capacity and supply chains, creating short-term headwinds for industrials.

market_impact.rationale: Logistics and industrial firms face operational disruption and cost overruns.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLI if weekly search interest rises 30% above 4-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 weeks or if interest falls below 10% above average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Warehouse fires and accidents happen regularly causing recurring search interest spikes.

idea: Daily spike in Google Trends searches for 'airline delay compensation' signals bearish XLY

data.source: Google Trends daily search interest for 'airline delay compensation'

behavior: Increased consumer searches for delay compensation indicate rising travel disruption and dissatisfaction.

market_impact.rationale: Consumer travel disappointment suggests airline revenue and service issues.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLY when daily search volume spikes 25% above 7-day average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 7 days or when search volume normalizes

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Travel disruptions and compensation claims surge frequently due to weather and operational issues.

idea: Weekly surge in local building permit refusals signals bearish XLRE

data.source: Public scrape of weekly local government building permit refusals

behavior: Rising building permit refusals constrain real estate development and signal future supply shortages.

market_impact.rationale: Real estate sector growth slows when permits are denied, reducing new inventory and sales.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLRE if weekly refusals increase by 20% vs prior 4-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 6 weeks or if refusals revert below 10% increase

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Building permit decisions are reported weekly and fluctuate with local politics and economic cycles.

idea: Weekly increase in Google Trends searches for 'DIY car repair' signals bullish XLY

data.source: Google Trends weekly search interest for 'DIY car repair'

behavior: Rising DIY car repair interest indicates consumers delaying dealership visits, increasing aftermarket parts demand.

market_impact.rationale: Consumer discretionary sector benefits from aftermarket and parts sales growth.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLY if weekly searches rise 20% above 5-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or if weekly searches drop below 10% above average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: DIY trends respond quickly to fuel prices and vehicle repair cost news.

idea: Weekly surge in Google Trends searches for 'warehouse automation jobs' signals bearish XLI

data.source: Google Trends weekly search interest for 'warehouse automation jobs'

behavior: Rising interest in warehouse automation jobs signals increased automation adoption, reducing long-term labor needs.

market_impact.rationale: Industrial labor displacement fears drive short-term sector caution.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLI if weekly searches rise 25% above 6-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 5 weeks or if searches decline below 10% above average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Automation adoption and labor market concerns regularly generate search interest bursts.

idea: Daily spike in Google Trends searches for 'frozen food shortage' signals bullish XLP

data.source: Google Trends daily search interest for 'frozen food shortage'

behavior: Spike in frozen food shortage searches indicates supply chain disruptions boosting consumer staples pricing power.

market_impact.rationale: Consumer staples companies can raise prices amid supply constraints.

trade_logic.exit: Exit after 7 days or if search interest normalizes below 10% above average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Food supply chain issues frequently spike due to weather and labor disruptions.

idea: Weekly surge in Google Trends searches for 'childcare availability crisis' signals bearish XLY

behavior: Rising childcare crisis concern pressures consumer discretionary spending and workforce participation.

market_impact.rationale: Childcare availability issues reduce consumer spending and labor force engagement.

trade_logic.exit: Exit after 5 weeks or if searches decline below 10% above average

idea: Weekly rise in Google Trends searches for 'EV charger outage' signals bearish XLC

data.source: Google Trends weekly search interest for 'EV charger outage'

behavior: Increased searches for EV charger outages indicate infrastructure reliability issues, slowing EV adoption confidence.

market_impact.rationale: Communication and infrastructure sectors tied to EV growth face headwinds if infrastructure falters.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLC if weekly searches spike 35% above 6-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or if searches normalize below 15% above average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Infrastructure issues and outages cause recurring search volume spikes.
